notes: All checks executed on live FreeBSD 14.4-RELEASE hardware with real ZFS pool, PF firewall, and theorem-node serving on port 3170.
This conformance run verifies the FreeBSD substrate is active and functional, not mocked.

checks.description: GET /status returns governance state with 25 proof obligations and 2 active entities
GET /ready returns 503 when THEOREM_WITNESS_TOKEN is not configured (expected behavior)
GET /capabilities returns 4 capabilities on 3.x contract line

checks.output_summary: Full OpenAPI JSON schema returned with components.schemas defined

checks.description: GET /auth/discovery returns bearer auth contract with THEOREM_WITNESS_TOKEN
Protected routes return 401 without token and 403 with wrong token
checks.output_summary: 401 Unauthorized without token, 403 Forbidden with invalid token

checks.description: ZFS pool 'theorem' ONLINE with 10 datasets mounted at correct paths
checks.output_summary: pool theorem ONLINE on nda0p5, 10 datasets including /, /theorem-store, /var/log/theorem, /etc/theorem

checks.description: PF firewall kernel module loaded and enabled
theorem-init store admit and verify work on real ZFS-backed /theorem-store
checks.command: theorem-init store admit /tmp/test-artifact.bin && theorem-init store verify
checks.output_summary: Artifact admitted: sha256-dacb6a87c532c18b77ddd0a46d91a5735c8ddd41a65165f6e3bb96aac9af2a67, Store verification: 1/1 artifacts valid

checks.description: All theorem binaries are native FreeBSD ELF executables with real substrate code paths
checks.output_summary: ELF 64-bit LSB pie executable, x86-64, version 1 (FreeBSD), for FreeBSD 14.4. Contains theorem_zfs::zfs, jail, veriexec, capsicum code paths.

checks.description: theorem-init version, check, boot status, governance report, and workload list all functional
checks.command: theorem-init version && theorem-init check && theorem-init boot status && theorem-init governance report
checks.output_summary: theorem-init 0.1.0, config valid (store_root=/theorem-store, boot_pool=theorem), boot env status reported, governance compliance report generated
